headline: How The Narrative On Altria Group (MO) Is Shifting With Conflicting Analyst Signals
summary: Altria Group’s latest research updates keep the core fair value anchor at US$65.50, even as individual firms move price targets in different directions. Some analysts are lifting targets into the low to mid US$70s, while others sit in the low US$60s or trim their view, reflecting the split between those focused on moderating cigarette volume declines and those more concerned about long run pressures. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets feed into the broader narrative and...
